title: Serv-0 Repair
effect: Your Serv-0 aids you in repairing other devices. It gains a modification in repair. Enabler. Serv-0 Scanner (2 Intellect points): Your Serv-0 gains the Scan ability. Enabler. Serv-0 Spy (3 Intellect points): You can send your Serv-0 up to a long distance away for up to ten minutes and see and hear through it as though its senses were your own. You direct its movement. Action to initiate.
details: Your Serv-0 aids you in repairing other devices. It gains a modification in repair. Enabler.
Serv-0 Scanner (2 Intellect points): Your Serv-0 gains the Scan ability. Enabler.

Serv-0 Spy (3 Intellect points): You can send your Serv-0 up to a long distance away for up to ten minutes and see and hear through it as though its senses were your own. You direct its movement. Action to initiate.
